image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you two different organisms can become one?
Context visual: Meet lichen, a remarkable partnership between fungi and algae.
Escalation visual: The fungi provide structure and protection, while algae produce food through photosynthesis.
Evidence visual: Together, they can survive in extreme environments—rocky surfaces, deserts, even the Arctic!
Payoff visual: But here’s the catch—scientists are still unraveling the full extent of this collaboration.
Cta visual: Curious about more science mysteries? Follow for more!
